example: The farmer owns a large herd of cattle.
The farmers planted a new crop of wheat this season.
They moved into a charming farmhouse with a large vegetable garden.
Wheat is one of the most commonly grown grains worldwide.
They built a greenhouse to grow vegetables year-round.
The farmers harvest wheat in late summer when the grains are fully ripe.
Every morning, the farmer milks the cows before sunrise.
Organic farming relies on natural methods and avoids the use of synthetic pesticides and fertilizers.
The farmer used a horse-drawn plow to till the soil before planting the crops.
The gardener carefully planted seeds in the fertile soil, eager to watch them grow into vibrant flowers.
She sows tomato seeds in the garden every spring for a fresh harvest.
The rancher built a new stable to accommodate the growing number of horses on the farm.
They visited a vineyard in France to learn about winemaking.
The old windmill was restored as a historical site.
